title: Plain Pack of 3 & 6 Muslin Squares Breathable & Soft Baby Clothes Essential Newborn Baby Boys Girls Muslin Square 100% Organic Cotton 71 x 71cm MS01 (Sky Blue, 6)
features: Newborn Baby Boys Girls Muslin Square Breathable & Soft Baby Clothes Essential. Super-soft, breathable and kind to sensitive skin, these organic muslins squares are perfect for your little one. Nursing cover or even as a sleep time comforter.

description: Newborn Baby Boys Girls Muslin Square Breathable & Soft Baby Clothes Essential. Super-soft, breathable and kind to sensitive skin, these organic muslins squares are perfect for your little one. Nursing cover or even as a sleep time comforter. A great baby shower gift, Each of the 6 muslin squares measures 71 x 71 cm.
